title: Conditional for wishes and advice
subtitle: Say would, should, could gently.
overview: Me gustaría means I would like.
Debería means should and is softer than debo.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I would like to travel more.
It would be better to go early.

items.es: Me gustaría hablar español con más confianza.
items.en: I would like to speak Spanish with more confidence.

items.es: Deberías escuchar frases todos los días.
items.en: You should listen to sentences every day.
We could eat together on Saturday.
It would be better to book beforehand.

items.es: Yo iría en tren porque es más barato.
items.en: I would go by train because it is cheaper.
